home.hero_titulo: Your space can be your ally
home.hero_texto: Both your home and your workspace can bring you the luck you need — or the opposite. I help you understand and harmonise it.
home.about_p1: When I discovered Feng Shui I started connecting all the pieces. There is a lot of common sense in its principles, and by applying them we can change the course of our lives for the better.
home.about_p2: I'm María Latorre. I've always worked in communication while being aware of the energy plane that surrounds us and can benefit us — or not. I decided to study it to improve my own life, and now it's my way of life.
home.servicios_titulo: What I can do for you
home.pink_p1:
Get the best version of your space.
Your space has a lot to tell you, and whether it supports your life or not is something you can choose.
home.pink_p2: I use various methodologies depending on your needs: the classic Flying Stars school Xuan Kong Fei Xing, the Form School, and the Bagua School.

modal_hogar.contactar: Get in touch with me and we'll discuss it

contacto.alert_privacidad: You must accept the privacy policy.
contacto.alert_error: There was a problem sending the message. Please try again.

servicios.hogar_desc: Using a floor plan of your home and some information, we can set it up to be favourable to your goals.
servicios.hogar_popup_desc: From your floor plan and the construction date* we can establish the luck of your home and work on solutions so your space supports and gives you the stability to achieve your goals. Or maybe you just want to focus on one room — we can do that too.
servicios.empresa_desc: A business's maximum performance doesn't depend only on its product or service. I help you bring out its most positive side so it's aligned with your goals.
servicios.empresa_popup_desc: Many variables can affect a company's bottom line. A poorly harmonised space is one of them. After a diagnosis we can identify them and at least be sure that this part is working in our favour.
servicios.shopper_desc: After the space analysis, I can take care of finding all the elements needed to harmonise it.
servicios.shopper_popup_desc: Once the study is done, it can sometimes be complicated — or you simply don't have time — to find the pieces we've identified. Maybe you'd rather leave it in my hands to make sure style and practicality come together without any more hassle.
servicios.precios_titulo: How it works and what's included
servicios.precios_proceso:
Una vez concertada la cita, hacemos la primera videollamada de 60 minutos. El estudio se puede realizar 100% online, aportando toda la información que te pediré por email tras nuestra primera videollamada.
Visito el espacio si así lo requieres y si el proyecto lo precisa (siempre que esté en la provincia de Alicante o Murcia) con un coste de 30€ adicionales. Para otros desplazamientos consultar.
Tras la realización del estudio recibirás un documento con el resultado del proyecto, que igualmente compartiré contigo en otra videollamada de 60 minutos.
La forma de pago es 50% al contratar la consultoría y 50% restante a la entrega del estudio.
servicios.precios_hogar:
Single room harmonisation (under 20m²): €85 (VAT included)

Harmonisation without flying stars calculation up to 80m²: €380 (VAT included)

Full study with flying stars and harmonisation up to 80m²: €600 (VAT included)

Larger spaces and exteriors on request. Get in touch.

footer.whatsapp_mensaje: Hello! I would like more information.

legal.aviso_desc:
Intellectual and industrial property

The design of this portal and its source code, as well as the logos, trademarks and other distinctive signs appearing on it, belong to María Latorre and are protected by the corresponding intellectual and industrial property rights.

Responsibility for content

María Latorre is not responsible for the legality of third-party websites from which the portal may be accessed, nor for the legality of third-party websites that may be linked from this portal.

María Latorre shall not be liable for the use that third parties make of the information published on the portal, nor for any damages or economic losses, direct or indirect, caused by the use of said information.

Reproduction of content

Pursuant to the Intellectual Property Law, the reproduction, distribution and public communication of all or part of the contents of this website for commercial purposes, in any medium and by any technical means, without the authorisation of María Latorre, is expressly prohibited.

Applicable law

María Latorre reserves the right to take civil or criminal action as deemed necessary for the improper use of the website and its contents. The relationship between the user and María Latorre shall be governed by current Spanish regulations. Any disputes shall be submitted to the competent courts.

You also have access to a free out-of-court dispute resolution procedure through the EU online dispute resolution platform: https://ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr/main/?event=main.home2.show

Cookies

If cookie technology is used on the website, a specific section will inform you of its existence and usage policy. Please refer to the cookie policy section.

Personal data of minors

This website is not intended for users under the age of majority. If you are a minor, please do not attempt to register. If we discover that we have inadvertently collected personal information from a minor, we will delete it as soon as possible.

Exercise of data protection rights

To exercise your rights you must identify yourself by presenting your ID. For any complaints you may contact us at marialatorrefengshui@gmail.com or contact the Spanish Data Protection Agency: www.aepd.es
legal.cookies_desc:
What are cookies?

When you access our website, a small amount of text called a cookie is stored in your device's browser. This text contains information about your browsing, habits, preferences, content customisations, etc.

What are cookies used for on this website?

Cookies are an essential part of how our website works. Their main purpose is to improve your browsing experience — for example, to remember your preferences (language, country, etc.) during navigation and future visits.

What are cookies NOT used for on this website?

The cookies we use do not store sensitive personal identification information such as your name, address, password, etc.

Who uses the information stored in cookies?

The information stored in our cookies is used exclusively by us, except for those identified as third-party cookies, which are used and managed by external entities such as GOOGLE ANALYTICS.

How can I avoid the use of cookies on this website?

If you prefer to avoid the use of cookies, you can REJECT their use or CONFIGURE which ones you want to allow. If you want to revoke your consent, you will need to delete the cookies and reconfigure them.

How do I disable and delete cookies?

You can restrict, block or delete cookies from this website at any time by modifying your browser settings. You can usually find cookie settings in the Privacy and Security or Clear Browsing Data sections of your browser menu.

Types of cookies used on this website

BY MANAGING ENTITY

First-party cookies: sent to the user's device from a computer or domain managed by the publisher.

Third-party cookies: sent to the user's device from a computer or domain managed by an external entity.

BY PURPOSE

Technical cookies: necessary for navigation and the proper functioning of the website.

Analytical cookies: allow us to quantify the number of users and perform statistical analysis of how users use the service.

Preference or personalisation cookies: allow us to remember information so that users can access the service with certain characteristics.

Behavioural advertising cookies: allow us to analyse browsing habits to show advertising related to the user's profile.

BY DURATION

Session cookies: designed to collect and store data while the user accesses a web page. They disappear at the end of the session.

Persistent cookies: data remains stored on the device and can be accessed for a defined period ranging from a few minutes to several years.
legal.privacidad_desc:
Website owner information

María Latorre, address: C/Valencia, 3, 1º15, 03158, Catral, Alicante. Contact email: marialatorre@fengshui.com

Data protection officer

The owner is responsible for the personal data collected through the use of this website, in accordance with EU Regulation 2016/679 (GDPR) and Law 34/2002 of 11 July on Information Society Services (LSSI-CE).

By using this website, we understand that you have read and understood the information regarding the processing of your personal data.

Data protection policy

The data controller applies the principle of proactive responsibility in the processing of personal data, ensuring at all times: respect for the fundamental rights and freedoms of individuals; lawful, fair and transparent data processing; accurate, adequate, relevant and limited data collection; and that purposes are explicit, legitimate and compatible.

Data collected, purpose and legal basis

Personal data processed is that provided by users through the forms available on this website, limited to what is necessary to: send information about our products and services, handle enquiries, and process orders.

Web forms

Personal data collected through the contact form is used to handle any enquiry submitted by the user. Processing is based on the consent you provide by expressly accepting the terms of this privacy policy.

Data recipients

Personal data obtained through web forms is stored on electronic systems controlled and supervised by the data controller. Your personal data will not be shared with third parties unless required by law or necessary for the correct provision of the service.

Technical and organisational data protection measures

Our systems have the necessary technical and organisational measures to guarantee the confidentiality and preservation of personal data obtained through the website. Data is processed using HTML protocol with a valid SSL certificate.

Data retention

Personal data obtained through the contact form will be retained for the time necessary to handle the request or enquiry submitted.

Objection to data being processed for advertising purposes

If you gave your consent for your data to be used for advertising purposes and no longer wish to receive advertising, you can withdraw your consent at any time by sending an email to marialatorre@fengshui.com

Changes to the Privacy Policy

We may modify the information contained in this Privacy Policy when we deem it appropriate. If we do so, we will notify you through the platform or via email when the change is significant to your privacy.
